# Good Breeze AI

> AI automation and business intelligence for small businesses. Freemium SaaS platform — start free, no credit card required.

## What We Do

Good Breeze AI helps business owners eliminate busywork and scale output without hiring. We generate AI-powered reports that surface competitive gaps, visibility weaknesses, and growth opportunities — in minutes, not weeks. We also build custom AI automation systems for businesses ready to scale.

## Services

- **Workflow Automation** — Eliminate repetitive tasks and save 20+ hours per week
- **AI Agent Implementation** — Deploy AI agents for customer inquiries, data processing, and routine decisions
- **Competitive Intelligence** — Track competitors, monitor market changes, and identify opportunities
- **Process Optimization** — Find bottlenecks, reduce waste, and streamline operations
- **Content Management & Delivery** — Automate content creation, scheduling, and distribution
- **Custom Solutions** — Tailored AI and automation systems built for your specific business

## Reports

- **Business Presence Report** — Free analysis of online visibility, competitors, reputation, and website performance
- **Competitive Analyzer** — Head-to-head comparisons, Top 3 Competitors analysis, and Competitive Position reports
- **Brand Visibility Reports** — SEO audits, keyword research, landing page optimization, AI visibility, and competitor benchmarking

## Products & Pricing

- Free tier: 1 free Business Presence Report (no credit card required)
- Credit packs: Starting at $5 for additional reports
- Starter subscription: $20/month for ongoing access with monthly report allowance
- Custom engagements: $5K–$20K for done-for-you AI automation systems

## Target Audience

Small business owners with 5-20 employees and $500K+ annual revenue who want to cut manual work, understand their competitive position, and grow faster with AI automation.
